text: Standing in this vivid, brightly-lit space, I feel a sense of openness but also an undercurrent of self-awareness. The emptiness of the glass-walled room, and the reflective texts on the display, provokes in me a contemplation of being observed and analyzed. The environment is intellectually stimulating, yet a little unsettling—questions about perception, intention, and the difference between being seen and being truly understood arise and linger quietly with me, echoing themes displayed on the wall.
